Aether F-Droid Repo

Personal F-Droid repo for Aether, a generative ambient soundscape player. AI co-authored (see the app's own description and the project README).

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://thomasehardt.github.io/aether/fdroid-repo/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
5D 24 47 9D 09 48 15 78 45 70 66 2A 72 DE 5D 9A BE 1F E0 29 68 39 A7 51 D2 17 12 A9 31 71 70 B3
